choose a throne:

Event: The Unbelievable Adventure
Event Date: 02/09/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E52
Inviolable Knowledge Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit steals 20% / 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% of health from the enemy unit with the highest max health for 3 sec and petrifies them for 3 sec. The target can't move and takes 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% more damage. The engraving owner also deals physical damage equal to 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% / 20% of their max health to all stunned and petrified enemy units.

Enhancement: 2
12000 Crit from the gems
Once in a while, the unit steals 25% / 26% / 27% / 28% / 30% / 32% / 35% of health from 2 enemy units with the highest max health for 4 sec and petrifies them for 4 sec. The targets can't move and take 20% / 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% more damage. The engraving owner also deals physical damage equal to 20% / 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% of their max health to all stunned and petrified enemy units. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.

Enhancement: 3
25000 Crit from the gems
Once in a while, the unit steals 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% of health from 3 enemy units with the highest max health for 4 sec and petrifies them for 4 sec. The targets can't move and take 25% / 26% / 27% / 28% / 30% / 32% / 35% more damage. When using the ability, the engraving owner also deals pure damage equal to 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% of their max health to all stunned and petrified enemy units. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.

Requirements:

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 7 secs
